text.name: n12
text.text:
1. Insert a coin and press the SPIN button; the coin will fall from the top of the screen.
2. When the falling coin passes through the [SPIN] channel on the pegboard, the reels start spinning. If matching icons land on the payline when the reels stop, you win a reward.
3. When the falling coin passes through one of the eight channels below the pegboard, the points for that channel’s icon increase by 1.
